title: Tom Davidson
description: Senior Research Fellow — Tom Davidson is the author of [a series of reports on AI timelines, and whether AI could drive explosive growth](https://www.openphilanthropy.org/research/key-writings-on-ai-development-from-open-philanthropy-staff/#id-2-ai-timelines). Tom
body:
# Tom Davidson

**Role:** Senior Research Fellow

Tom Davidson is the author of [a series of reports on AI timelines, and whether AI could drive explosive growth](https://www.openphilanthropy.org/research/key-writings-on-ai-development-from-open-philanthropy-staff/#id-2-ai-timelines). Tom was previously a Senior Research Fellow at [Open Philanthropy](https://www.openphilanthropy.org/), a research scientist at the UK Government's [AI Security Institute](https://www.aisi.gov.uk/), and a data scientist at a startup. Tom has a first-class masters degree in physics and philosophy from the University of Oxford.
